notes: v0.116.0 adds agent-memory-2026-07-22 beta header for API opt-in — thin SDK add (just the header); actual behavior lives on the platform side. Signals a new Managed-Agents memory primitive that folds naturally with KB-06 §Managed-Agents-primitives (opened 07-01 via v0.115.0 event-delta-streaming/agent-overrides/reverse-pagination/vault-credential-injection-scoping/agent+deployment-webhook-events). Five releases in five days (v0.113 06-29, v0.114+v0.115 06-30, v0.115.1 07-01, v0.116.0 07-02) — extends prior 'fastest anthropic-sdk cadence in the vigilance window' streak.
